LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER INTERNATIONAL ASSOCIATION OF BRIDGE, STRUCTURAL, ORNAMENTAL & REINFORCING IRON WORKERS, LOCAL UNION 377 MOTION FOR PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. NO OPPOSITION FILED. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULES AS FOLLOWS: THERE BEING NO PROOF OF SERVICE PROVIDED TO THE COURT, MOTION FOR PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS DENIED.
